_comment: MCP server configuration for the Cognitive Core agent loop.
_comment2: Add any MCP server here. The agent loop connects to all at startup.
_comment3: Tool mappings map model tool names → MCP server or built-in tools.

agent_model.description: Small model specialized for tool/bash generation. Used when the router fails to generate correct tool calls.

web_search.description: Search the web for current information

tavily_research.description: Perform in-depth research on a topic

shell_exec.description: Run a shell command on the local machine (e.g. find, grep, ls)

file_search.description: Search for files on the local machine by name or content

rag_status.description: Show the current state of the RAG knowledge base: total chunks, sample entries, what sources are stored

rag_query.description: Query the RAG knowledge base (Chroma + Granite 4.1-8B) for answers from ingested documentation.

granite_respond.description: Delegate a general question to Granite 4.1-8B for a helpful answer. Use for any Q&A, explanations, or when the user asks a question that needs a thoughtful response.

agent_task.description: Send a multi-step or tool-using task to Qwen 4B agent. Use when the task needs bash commands, web search, file operations, or multiple steps.
